texto: Then one woman looked directly at her husband. "Is our place gone?" "I'm afraid so, girl," he said. "There isn't much left up there. But we're alive. We're all lucky to be alive. We'd have been dead if we'd stayed up above." "Oh, what a mercy we didn't!" she exclaimed. "How lucky we are!" Incredible though it sounds, within a few moments, a whole lot of people were congratulating each other on their extraordinary good fortune in only having lost all their worldy posessions.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ida Cook que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Then one woman looked directly at her husband. "Is our place gone?" "I'm afraid so, girl," he sai…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, british, london-bombing, com foco em london-bombing e luck.
